name: GEO Optimizer
description: Open-source AI search visibility audit and optimization toolkit
capabilities: Audit website GEO score (0-100) across 8 categories
Auto-generate fix files (robots.txt, llms.txt, schema, meta)
Content citability analysis with 47 research-backed methods
MCP server for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf
CI/CD integration with GitHub Actions, SARIF, JUnit
